description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure, likely female, dressed in a long, draped garment reminiscent of ancient Greco-Roman attire. The figure stands upright on a rectangular plinth, with one arm extended forward and the other resting by the side. The facial features are calm and idealized, with hair styled in a classical manner. The garment is cinched at the waist, creating naturalistic folds and drapery that cascade down to the feet, which are bare and firmly planted on the base. The surface has a greenish patina, suggesting it is cast in bronze or a similar metal, and the overall form is slender and elegant.
description: A classical-style bronze sculpture of a standing human figure in draped attire, with one arm extended and a greenish patina finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full frontal details of the figure, including facial features, draped garment, and both arms, with the right arm extended forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the extended right arm, and the depth of the draped garment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the gathered garment at the waist, and the straight posture of the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the left arm resting by the side and the profile of the head and body.
attribute_subject_matter: standing human figure in classical attire
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the sculpture is isolated on a plain background.
